originalTitle: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rises further, WHO warns
summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
content: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
chineseTitle: 世卫组织警告称，随着死亡人数进一步上升，埃博拉疫苗可能需要九个月的时间
chineseSummary: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。
chineseContent: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
